name: Greek Homestyle Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 or 5 potatoes, peeled and sliced French-fry style
1 head of garlic, cloves peeled but whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a shallow baking tray.
2. Arrange potatoes around the chicken pieces.
3. Scatter whole peeled garlic cloves around the chicken and potatoes.
4. Mix together lemon juice and olive oil, and pour evenly over chicken and potatoes.
5. Add water until potatoes are just about covered. Season with salt, pepper to taste, and oregano generously.
6. Bake at 350°F (400°F for high altitude) until tops of chicken are reddish brown.
7. Turn the chicken and stir the potatoes. Sprinkle on more oregano. If potatoes aren't at least half-covered with liquid, add water.
8. Return to oven for about 15-20 minutes. Chicken is done when both sides are lightly browned and potatoes are soft when touched with a fork.
9. Serve with crusty bread or pita bread.
